title: Shadows of Forgotten Ancestors
overview: In the Carpathian Mountains of 19th-century Ukraine, love, hate, life and death among the Hutsul people are as they’ve been since time began. Ivan is drawn to Marichka, the beautiful young daughter of the man who killed his father. But fate tragically decrees that the two lovers will remain apart.

trailers.title: «Тіні забутих предків» Сергія Параджанова - трейлер від KyivMusicFilm
